article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The source article is from the Associated Press and is already relatively neutral in tone. The model's summary maintains neutral language throughout, properly attributes statements to the White House, and doesn't introduce any loaded framing. The summary is factual and clinical.

custom_reasoning.spin: All verbs are neutral: 'returned,' 'identified,' 'stated,' 'indicated.' No loaded verbs.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are attributed to the White House or directly from the article's factual reporting.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as fact. The summary sticks to reported events.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Language is measured and clinical throughout. No dramatic or alarming language.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about anyone's thoughts or motivations beyond what was stated.
custom_reasoning.slant: The article itself only has one real perspective (White House/AP factual reporting), and the summary reflects this proportionally.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: All perspectives present in the source article are reflected in the summary. The source itself is a straightforward news report with limited perspectives.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: No loaded adjectives. 'Minor' is used but that's the White House's own characterization which is appropriately attributed.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: All language choices are politically neutral.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: The summary matches the source's balanced tone, noting the precautionary nature of the return and the plan to continue the trip.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: The article only contains official sources, and the summary reflects this without adding bias.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: The summary is neutral and factual, matching or exceeding the neutrality of the already-neutral AP source.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: All perspectives from the article are represented. The source article itself was a straightforward factual report with limited perspectives.
